parameters.name: rec_trade_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for this transaction generated by TapPay server.

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. May be customized but must be unique.

missing: Merchant-hosted redirect URL; path defined by merchant, not TapPay (path=null)
Source does not define what the merchant endpoint must reply (no receiver response documented)
summary: Frontend Redirect callback — after an e-payment or Direct Pay 3D transaction completes, TapPay redirects the user to the merchant's frontend_redirect_url via web redirection, appending four transaction-result query-string parameters (rec_trade_id, order_number, bank_transaction_id, status). Merchant-hosted URL; path not defined by TapPay.
